purpose: Pre-M2 parity audit of the 7 verify-during-M1 langs (TS/JS, Go, Java, Swift, CSharp, Scala, Elixir). Diff each lang's regex sanitizer Vec entries against the AST sanitizer bank entries. Per premortem A1 expect ZERO gaps for the 2 pre-flagged candidates (Ruby Rack::Utils + PHP cast); the 7 verify-during-M1 langs are expected to PASS with M2 wiring alone.
verification_method: Direct read of taint.rs at HEAD e772913 + the 3-LOC AST_ONLY_TEST_MODE extension. Each regex Vec entry (per LanguagePatterns at L525-751) compared against the corresponding AST_SANITIZERS bank (TYPESCRIPT_AST_SANITIZERS L1993, GO_AST_SANITIZERS L2070, JAVA_AST_SANITIZERS L2143, SWIFT_AST_SANITIZERS L2522, CSHARP_AST_SANITIZERS L2588, SCALA_AST_SANITIZERS L2647, ELIXIR_AST_SANITIZERS L2829).

TypeScript_JavaScript.gap_detail: Regex bank includes Zod-style `.parse(` / `.safeParse(` (entry 3) which has NO AST counterpart. Per dispatch-contract per_language_verdict TypeScript_JavaScript: 'verify_during_M1, expected full parity; if Zod .parse wildcard mismatch, M3 add (\"*\",\"parse\")/(\"*\",\"safeParse\")'. M3 SHOULD add ('*', 'parse') and ('*', 'safeParse') member_patterns Numeric entry to TYPESCRIPT_AST_SANITIZERS. ACTION: M3 to add 1 entry with 2 member_patterns. NOT BLOCKING for M2 sanitize_breaks_flow_ast_only_<lang> RED→GREEN transition since the M1 fixtures use parseInt/Number which ARE in the AST bank.

gaps_to_address_in_m3: TYPESCRIPT_AST_SANITIZERS: add Numeric entry with member_patterns: [("*", "parse"), ("*", "safeParse")] for Zod .parse() / .safeParse() forms. Per dispatch-contract per_language_verdict, this was anticipated as a possible M3 addition. The M1 ast_only test for TypeScript uses parseInt() (which is already covered) so this gap does NOT prevent M2 RED→GREEN transition for the existing fixtures, but the gap is real and will surface as a regression IF a downstream consumer relies on Zod .parse() being detected as a sanitizer.

ruby_rack_utils_escape_html.ast_location: RUBY_AST_SANITIZERS member_patterns at taint.rs:2416 — present at HEAD

php_int_cast_expression.ast_location: PHP_AST_SANITIZERS member_patterns at taint.rs:2717 — present at HEAD

premortem_a1_compatibility: PASS — both pre-flagged parity targets confirmed already at HEAD. Premortem A1's 'zero additions expected' guidance holds for these 2; the TS/JS Zod gap surfaced by this audit is the ONE addition expected in M3 (within the up-to-12-LOC contingency budget noted in plan.md §M3 loc_delta_note).
